description: THURSDAY JUNE 20 1957 Obituaries n Allen Thompson Allen Thompson 55 of 11 j Brewer Street lied unexpectedly while at work at Pratt Whit ney Aircraft He had worked 30 years at the plant as a naval in spector He belonged to South Congre gational Church and Rochambeau Elms post 2083 Veterans of For eign Wars Surviving are his wife Mrs Edna Ericson Thompson a son Allen R Thompson East Hart ford and a sister Mrs Arthur Truax Hartford Harry Bellucci Harry Bellucci 790 Silver Ldne died at his home last Wednesday He was proprietor of Dons Pizza Shop at 130 Spruce Stieet Man chester A World War I veteran he be longed to DilworthCornellQuey Post American Legion the ArmyNavy Club and the Magli anese Society all of Manchester Surviving are his wife Mrs Beatrice Belluci three daughters Miss Jean Bellucci East Hart ford and Mrs Michael Dellaripa and Mrs Richard DAmato both ALTERATION SALE Weve been renovating our store to make more room for our customers To com plete the job we are offering a number of TELEVISION SETS from our REGULAR stock at these REDUCED PRICES Dont Miss These SAVINGS Motorola Model Number 21K55 36900 Value 269 00
